title: ageratina seleri
intro: Ageratina seleri, also known as Seler's mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ageratina seleri include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Ageratina seleri is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
